tldr: A peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran was announced, leading to a significant drop in global oil prices.
SpaceX is set to acquire AI coding firm Anysphere for $60 billion, boosting its market capitalization past Amazon.
The FBI successfully thwarted a drone plot targeting a White House event, with multiple suspects taken into custody.

market.why: Global oil prices declined, with Brent crude dipping below $80 per barrel for the first time since March. This movement was largely attributed to the interim peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran, with hopes that the deal would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for oil transit (CNBC, https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/16/us-iran-peace-agreement-oil-prices-tankers-strait-of-hormuz-transit.html; Yahoo Finance, https://finance.yahoo.com/news/oil-rebounds-concerns-us-iran-011407637.html).

tech.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is acquiring Anysphere, the startup behind the AI-powered coding app Cursor, for $60 billion. This acquisition has reportedly propelled SpaceX's market capitalization past Amazon, reaching $2.8 trillion.
Google Chrome's next update is anticipated to mark the end of popular ad blockers by altering how extensions can interact with web content.
Mobileye is set to enter the U.S. robotaxi market with a standalone service, leveraging its Moovit platform to launch in a U.S. city by 2027.

world.summary: A peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran was announced by President Trump at the G7 summit. Iran is reportedly presenting the deal as a victory, though for many Iranians it signifies a necessary step to lower prices and alleviate fears of conflict.
The FBI thwarted a drone plot targeting a UFC event at the White House, with court documents alleging the plan involved drones. Multiple suspects have been taken into custody.

Reports indicate a Russian frigate, the Admiral Grigorovich, fired warning shots within 500 meters of a British yacht in the English Channel near the Isle of Wight. The UK Ministry of Defence is investigating the incident.
